items.hook: HDB has ramped up two-room flat supply across recent BTO launches, but the singles queue
items.caption:
HDB has ramped up two-room flat supply across recent BTO launches, but the singles queue has kept pace. When demand climbs alongside supply, your ballot odds barely shift. If you are a single buyer banking on a shorter wait, check the actual application rates before locking in your timeline. See the data at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to a friend who is house hunting.
items.cap_zh:
HDB 增加了两房式组屋的供应，但单身申请者的数量也同步上升。供应多了不等于抽签更容易，超额认购率依然居高不下。如果你是单身买家，计划通过BTO置业，建议先看清楚实际数据，再决定时间线。更多资讯请到 propsight.sg 查看，链接在简介。

把这个发给正在看房的朋友。

items.hook: Dunearn House has launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, with pri
items.caption:
Dunearn House has launched as the first private condo in Bukit Timah Turf City, with prices starting from $2,799 psf. That is a noticeable step above most outside central region condos, and the location premium is real. Before you decide if the price makes sense, check what nearby units have actually transacted for using the free tools at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Send this to someone deciding where to buy.
items.cap_zh:
Dunearn House 正式推出，是武吉知马赛马场城区首个私人condo，起价每平方英尺2,799新元。这个价位明显高于大多数市郊condo，地段溢价不低，有意购买的朋友要看清楚价差再做决定。想查看周边成交记录和价格走势，上 propsight.sg 免费查，链接在简介。

转发给还没决定买哪里的人。

items.hook: There are only 93 multi-generation HDB flats in all of Bishan, and one just listed at $1
items.caption:
There are only 93 multi-generation HDB flats in all of Bishan, and one just listed at $1.59M. These flats give two family units separate entrances, separate kitchens, and real privacy under one roof, which is why demand consistently outpaces supply. If you are thinking about buying or selling one, check what past transactions actually closed at before you sit down to negotiate. Free resale transaction data at propsight.sg, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
碧山全区只有93个多代同堂HDB单位，其中一套刚以159万新元要价挂牌。这类HDB单位让两代家庭各有独立入口和厨房，在同一屋檐下保有真正的私人空间，正因如此供不应求的局面长期持续。如果你正考虑买入或卖出，谈价前先查清楚过去的成交记录。免费转售数据请上 propsight.sg，链接在简介栏。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Private resale prices in Singapore have flatlined near $1,753 psf, up just 0.6% on the m
items.caption:
Private resale prices in Singapore have flatlined near $1,753 psf, up just 0.6% on the month and 3.8% over the year. Sellers are not under pressure, volumes are steady, and there is no sign of forced selling anywhere in the market. The more interesting story is where movement is still happening: suburbs and city-fringe are outpacing the market, while prime is the one segment that has turned softer. Full breakdown in this month's free market report at propsight.sg/market-analysis, link in bio.

Know someone flat hunting? Send it their way.
items.cap_zh:
新加坡私宅转售价格趋于平稳，中位数约每平方英尺$1,753，月涨幅仅0.6%，年涨幅3.8%。市场上没有被迫抛售的迹象，成交量正常，卖家并不急着出手。更值得关注的是涨势的分布：OCR和RCR仍在上行，而CCR是目前唯一出现回软的板块。本月完整市场分析报告现已免费发布于propsight.sg/market-analysis，点击简介链接即可阅读。

认识正在找房的人？转给他。

items.hook: Where Singapore prices are really moving.
